subcodes.first_line: O thou servant of God! It has been some that no epistle has been forwarded to you from this land. Innumerable hindrances have brought about the interruption of correspondence
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده الهی مدتی است که از اینجانب نامه سمت تحریر نیافت این از موانع کثیر
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @praise and encouragement, @martyrs and martyrdom
